# StockFlow

> StockFlow is a multi-tenant inventory management platform for retailers, distributors, and multi-location businesses. Track products, stock, purchase orders, and sales orders in real time.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of StockFlow's inventory, purchasing, and sales features.

## Blog

- [Inventory vs Stock: What's the Difference?](/blog/inventory-vs-stock): Plain-English guide comparing inventory and stock across retail, manufacturing, accounting, and software.
